title: rungia parviflora var. muralis
intro: Rungia parviflora var. muralis, also known as the wall-rungia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rungia parviflora var. muralis include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
